# StrikePoint Sims

> Indoor golf simulator opening Fall 2026 in Colchester, Connecticut. Three Trackman iO bays, 24/7 autonomous access, 300+ virtual golf courses. Serving golfers across eastern Connecticut.

StrikePoint Sims is a private indoor golf simulator facility built for serious golfers in eastern Connecticut. The facility features three Trackman iO bays — the same dual-radar launch monitor system used on the PGA Tour — with autonomous 24/7 access via app-based booking and secure door codes. No staff required, no waiting, no bar noise.

## Key facts

- Location: Colchester, Connecticut (opening Fall 2026)
- Technology: Trackman iO (dual-radar, 30+ data points per swing)
- Courses: 300+ photorealistic virtual courses including Pebble Beach, St. Andrews, TPC Sawgrass
- Access: 24/7 autonomous — book from app, enter with code
- Bays: 3 private bays
- Walk-in rates: $45–60/hr depending on time of day
- Membership tiers: Range, Standard, Elite
- Founding Member program: 20 spots with permanent pricing discount

## Service area

Primary: Colchester, Hebron, Marlborough, East Hampton, Lebanon, Glastonbury
Extended: Norwich, Salem, Bozrah, Montville, Andover, Columbia, Gilead, Amston, Moodus
